goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'broxbourne' and should 'leave after 09:15'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'friday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'arrival time', and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
